metadata.blocker_removed: computes a bounded learned or proxy representation sample for external pilot readiness while preserving heuristic geometry retrieval as the baseline
metadata.predictive_feature_policy: representation status is computed from sequence embeddings and sequence length coverage only; identifiers, EC/Rhea, mechanism text, labels, and heuristic fingerprint ids are review context or holdout context only
metadata.requested_model_load_failure: requested ESM-2 weights are not present in the local Hugging Face cache
metadata.review_only_rule: computed representation samples are controls only; they do not replace sequence-search, review-decision, or factory gates
